title: Lisbon Collage Poster 2 AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: travel collage poster for Lisbon. Subject: Lisbon is represented through Belem Tower, yellow tram, tiled facades, Tagus riverside, terracotta roofs, and tiny walking figures, with a clear sense of place and travel-memory atmosphere. Scene: azulejo tile fragments, travel stamps, cafe notes, botanical sketches, and hand-marked map details add local texture, map-like context, small props, and collectible travel detail. Composition: Fixed vertical travel-collage composition with layered landmarks, stamp or map details, clean title area, and balanced postcard hierarchy. Style: Pinterest-ready travel memory collage with refined illustration detail, soft editorial layering, clean decorative rhythm, and collectible poster finish. Color Palette: Unified palette chosen to support the subject, clean contrast, readable details, and a premium finished image. Lighting: Believable polished lighting with controlled highlights, readable shadows, depth, and artifact-free detail. Camera: Clean camera perspective that keeps the main subject readable and preserves the template composition. Typography: FIELD NOTES appears as the readable destination or poster title, short and integrated with the travel layout. Signature Elements: Lisbon, Belem Tower, yellow tram, tiled facades, Tagus riverside, terracotta roofs, and tiny walking figures, azulejo tile fragments, travel stamps, cafe notes, botanical sketches, and hand-marked map details, and FIELD NOTES define the reusable travel-poster mechanism. Restrictions: Keep one coherent image, concrete subject detail, readable anatomy or object structure, clean text when present, no placeholder words, no watermark, no extra unrelated elements, and no artifact-heavy output.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: travel collage poster for Marrakech. Subject: Marrakech is represented through Koutoubia Mosque silhouette, medina archways, spice market textures, mosaic tiles, and desert palms, with a clear sense of place and travel-memory atmosphere. Scene: woven textiles, lantern sketches, market tags, map fragments, botanical notes, and travel stamp marks add local texture, map-like context, small props, and collectible travel detail. Composition: Fixed vertical travel-collage composition with layered landmarks, stamp or map details, clean title area, and balanced postcard hierarchy. Style: Pinterest-ready travel memory collage with refined illustration detail, soft editorial layering, clean decorative rhythm, and collectible poster finish. Color Palette: Unified palette chosen to support the subject, clean contrast, readable details, and a premium finished image. Lighting: Believable polished lighting with controlled highlights, readable shadows, depth, and artifact-free detail. Camera: Clean camera perspective that keeps the main subject readable and preserves the template composition. Typography: AFTER RAIN appears as the readable destination or poster title, short and integrated with the travel layout. Signature Elements: Marrakech, Koutoubia Mosque silhouette, medina archways, spice market textures, mosaic tiles, and desert palms, woven textiles, lantern sketches, market tags, map fragments, botanical notes, and travel stamp marks, and AFTER RAIN define the reusable travel-poster mechanism. Restrictions: Keep one coherent image, concrete subject detail, readable anatomy or object structure, clean text when present, no placeholder words, no watermark, no extra unrelated elements, and no artifact-heavy output.
